description: A formal document that initiates the project, defines its objectives, scope, and stakeholders. It outlines the project's purpose, goals, and high-level requirements, and assigns roles and responsibilities. It serves as a foundational agreement among key stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Define project goals and objectives based on the problem statement.
Identify key stakeholders and their roles.
Outline the project scope, deliverables, and success criteria.
Establish a high-level budget and timeline.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A document that identifies potential risks to the project, assesses their likelihood and impact, and outlines mitigation strategies. It helps the project team proactively manage risks and minimize their potential impact on project success.
steps_to_create: Identify potential risks based on project scope and objectives.
Assess the likelihood and impact of each risk.
Develop mitigation strategies for high-priority risks.
Assign responsibility for monitoring and managing each risk.
Regularly review and update the risk register.

description: A document that outlines how project information will be communicated to stakeholders. It defines communication channels, frequency, and content, ensuring that stakeholders are kept informed of project progress and any issues that arise.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their communication needs.
Define communication channels and frequency.
Outline the types of information to be communicated.
Assign responsibility for communication tasks.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A document that outlines how the project team will engage with stakeholders to build support for the project and address any concerns. It identifies key stakeholders, their interests, and strategies for engaging with them effectively.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their interests.
Assess stakeholder influence and potential impact on the project.
Develop engagement strategies for each stakeholder group.
Define communication channels and frequency.
Assign responsibility for engagement tasks.

description: A document that outlines how the project team will manage changes to the project scope, timeline, or budget. It defines the process for requesting, evaluating, and approving changes, ensuring that changes are implemented in a controlled and coordinated manner.
steps_to_create: Define the change management process.
Establish a change control board.
Develop a change request form.
Outline the process for evaluating and approving changes.
Communicate the change management process to stakeholders.

description: A document that outlines the project's overall budget and funding sources. It provides a high-level overview of project costs and identifies potential funding gaps. It also describes the process for managing project finances and tracking expenditures.
steps_to_create: Estimate project costs based on project scope and deliverables.
Identify potential funding sources, including government grants, private funding, and internal resources.
Develop a high-level budget that allocates funding to different project activities.
Establish a process for tracking expenditures and managing project finances.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A template for agreements with funding providers (e.g., grant agreements, contracts). It outlines the terms and conditions of funding, including payment schedules, reporting requirements, and intellectual property rights.
steps_to_create: Identify the key terms and conditions that need to be included in the funding agreement.
Develop a template that can be used for different funding sources.
Ensure that the template complies with all applicable laws and regulations.
Obtain approval from legal counsel.
Customize the template for each funding agreement.

description: A document that outlines the project's key milestones and deadlines. It provides a high-level overview of the project timeline and helps the project team track progress and identify potential delays.
steps_to_create: Identify key project milestones and deliverables.
Estimate the time required to complete each task.
Develop a high-level timeline that shows the sequence of tasks and milestones.
Identify critical path activities.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A framework for monitoring and evaluating the project's progress and impact. It defines key performance indicators (KPIs), data collection methods, and reporting requirements. It helps the project team track progress, identify areas for improvement, and demonstrate the project's value to stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Define project goals and objectives.
Identify key performance indicators (KPIs) for each objective.
Develop data collection methods for each KPI.
Establish reporting requirements and frequency.
Assign responsibility for monitoring and evaluation tasks.

document_name: Current State Assessment of Digital Identity Landscape in Denmark
description: A report that assesses the current state of digital identity in Denmark, including the existing infrastructure, regulatory framework, and stakeholder landscape. It provides a baseline for measuring the project's impact and identifying opportunities for improvement.
steps_to_create: Gather data on the existing digital identity infrastructure in Denmark.
Analyze the regulatory framework for digital identity.
Identify key stakeholders and their roles.
Assess the strengths and weaknesses of the current system.
Develop recommendations for improvement.

description: A high-level plan outlining the approach to demonstrating the technical feasibility of platform-neutral and fallback-capable authentication. It defines the scope and focus of the technical demonstrators, objectives, and success metrics.
steps_to_create: Define the scope and focus of the technical demonstrators.
Identify the objectives of the demonstrators.
Establish success metrics for the demonstrators.
Outline the technical approach to developing the demonstrators.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A high-level plan outlining the approach to influencing Digitaliseringsstyrelsen and other stakeholders. It defines the framing and messaging used to advocate for platform neutrality and fallback access.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their interests.
Define the framing and messaging to be used.
Outline the policy proposals to be advocated for.
Establish success metrics for the advocacy efforts.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A high-level plan outlining the approach to building a broad coalition of support for the project. It defines the scope and composition of the project's support base and outlines strategies for securing buy-in from key stakeholders.
steps_to_create: Identify key stakeholders and their interests.
Define the scope and composition of the coalition.
Outline strategies for engaging with stakeholders.
Establish success metrics for the coalition building efforts.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A high-level plan outlining the approach to shaping AltID procurement documents to include requirements for platform neutrality and fallback access. It defines the specific requirements to be advocated for and outlines strategies for influencing the procurement process.
steps_to_create: Analyze AltID procurement documents.
Identify opportunities to influence the procurement process.
Define the specific requirements to be advocated for.
Outline strategies for engaging with procurement officials.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.

description: A high-level plan outlining the approach to influencing European Digital Identity Wallet standards to support platform-neutral access and certified fallback mechanisms. It defines the specific standards to be targeted and outlines strategies for engaging with EU bodies.
steps_to_create: Identify relevant EU standards and guidelines.
Analyze the current state of EU standards development.
Define the specific standards to be targeted.
Outline strategies for engaging with EU bodies.
Obtain approval from key stakeholders.
